results.title: Vivo Y600 Turbo set to launch on May 25, here’s what to expect
results.description: Last month, Vivo unveiled the Vivo Y600 Pro equipped with a massive 10,200mAh battery. The brand has now started teasing a new phone dubbed the Vivo Y600 Turbo. Here’s a look at what to expect from the upcoming device. Vivo Y600 Turbo specifications (expected) The poster above confirms that the Vivo Y600 Turbo will be [...] The post Vivo Y600 Turbo set to launch on May 25, here’s what to expect appeared first on Gizmochina .
